creator: mallocbsd@foxmail.com
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-submitting.html 
contains an obsolete URL http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr-summary.cgi?category=ports, which was 301-redirected to https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/query.cgi, which is not the list of pending port PRs but a general query page not devoted to pending ports.
